description: Aggregated view of all current boundaries, their reaffirmation timestamps, and overall system safety state. Designed for quick human or automated inspection.

dashboard_fields.boundary_id: unique reference to entry in boundary-integrity-log.json
dashboard_fields.initiator: participant who set or last modified the boundary
dashboard_fields.next_due: ISO timestamp of next scheduled reaffirmation
